name: Single table import with filter and column selection
description: Tests Pattern 1: sqlread with RowFilter and databaseImportOptions for pushdown column selection and row filtering on a single table.
prompt: Import only the OrderID and Total columns from a SQLite database table called 'orders' where Total > 100. Use pushdown filtering, not client-side filtering.

assertions.description: Uses sqlread (not fetch) for single-table import
Uses RowFilter to push the Total > 100 filter to the database
Uses databaseImportOptions with SelectedVariableNames to select only OrderID and Total
Does NOT import all rows and filter in MATLAB afterward
assertions.expected: No post-import filtering on the result table

name: Two-table join with filter and post-join column selection
description: Tests Pattern 3: sqlinnerjoin with RowFilter, then column selection in MATLAB after the join (since join functions do not accept databaseImportOptions).
prompt: Join the 'orders' table with the 'customers' table on CustomerID, filtering for orders where Status is 'shipped'. Return only OrderID, CustomerName, and Total columns.

assertions.description: Uses sqlinnerjoin (not raw SQL JOIN) for the two-table join
Passes Keys='CustomerID' or equivalent to sqlinnerjoin
Uses RowFilter for the Status filter (pushed to database)
Does NOT pass databaseImportOptions to sqlinnerjoin
Selects columns in MATLAB after the join (post-join selection)
assertions.expected: Table indexing to select columns after join

name: Three-table join using fetch with explicit SQL
description: Tests Pattern 4: fetch with explicit SQL for 3+ table joins, since pushdown joins only support exactly 2 tables.
prompt: Join orders, customers, and products tables to get a report of customer names, product names, and order totals for orders over $500. Use the most appropriate approach.

assertions.description: Uses fetch with explicit SQL (not sqlinnerjoin) because 3+ tables are involved
SQL query contains JOIN clauses connecting all three tables
assertions.expected: INNER JOIN or JOIN for orders-customers and orders-products

assertions.description: SQL query contains WHERE clause for the $500 filter
Does NOT attempt to chain multiple sqlinnerjoin calls
